rubricContent.textProperty: The governance report includes a clear methodology section explaining the audit approach.

rubrics.description: Ensures the report documents how the audit was conducted.

rubricContent.textProperty: The report lists specific data quality issues found (e.g., field violations, topology errors).

rubrics.description: Validates that concrete findings are reported, not generic statements.

rubricContent.textProperty: The report provides actionable recommendations for fixing identified issues.

rubrics.description: Checks if the report goes beyond problem identification to suggest solutions.
